data.title: Pro-Israel hacker releases Nobitex’s source code after BTC, XRP exploits
data.description:
A pro-Israel hacking collective has followed through on its promise to release the full source code of Nobitex, Iran’s largest cryptocurrency exchange, just a day after orchestrating a high-profile blockchain exploit involving more than $100 million in digital assets. The group known as Gonjeshke Darande, also referred to as Predatory Sparrow, published a post on […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/israel-hacker-releases-nobitexs-source-code/

data.title: Trump Cuts Stake in World Liberty Financial by 20% Quietly
data.description:
Trump cuts stake in World Liberty Financial from 60% to 40% amid rising interest in stablecoin markets. Read more below.
source: https://coincu.com/344269-trump-cuts-stake-in-world-liberty-financial

data.title: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov Granted Temporary Leave from France
data.description: According to Foresight News, Telegram CEO Pavel Durov has been authorized to leave France for up to 14 days starting July 10. This permission is restricted to travel to Dubai, while all other conditions of his judicial supervision remain unchanged.

data.title: 99Bitcoins Exclusive: OKX Launches In Germany, Poland As Company’s Nordics General Manager Discusses MiCA Implications
data.description:
Global crypto exchange OKX launched its fully regulated centralized crypto exchange in Germany and Poland on 17 June 2025. The launch comes after OKX secured a full Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) license from Malta’s Financial Services Authority (MFSA) 0n 27 January 2025. “Today’s a big day for us at OKX—and for crypto users across Europe,”.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/99bitcoins-exclusive-okx-launches-in-germany-poland-as-companys-nordics-general-manager-discusses-mica-implications/

data.title: Pump Fun judge questions Burwick Law’s need for two lawsuits
data.description:
The Pump Fun lawsuit judge says she “doesn’t understand” why there are two lawsuits and asked for Burwick Law to explain itself.
source: https://protos.com/pump-fun-judge-questions-burwick-laws-need-for-two-lawsuits/

data.title: Kraken Integrates with Babylon to Launch Bitcoin Staking Service
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto exchange Kraken has launched a Bitcoin staking service through a new integration with Babylon, which allows users to directly stake their Bitcoin and lock it in a custody vault on the native chain. The staked Bitcoin will then be delegated to the PoS network through Babylon, and rewards will be paid in the form of BABY tokens. The mechanism is carried out entirely on-chain, and staking is managed by Bitcoin scripts and cryptographic safeguards to prevent malicious behavior. Users can cancel the stake at any time, and the unbinding period is about 7 days. (CoinDesk)

data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, 1000PEPE/USDT and XRP/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.03, funding rate: 0.0002%.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.33, funding rate: 0.0098%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.87, funding rate: 0.0028%.1000PEPE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.41, funding rate: 0.0100%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.94, funding rate: 0.0047%.

data.title: Hypersphere Partner Loses Funds in Phishing Attack
data.description: According to Odaily, Hypersphere Investment Partner Mehdi Farooq has reported a significant loss after falling victim to a phishing attack involving a fake Zoom call. Farooq disclosed that funds from six of his wallets were stolen, resulting in the loss of years of savings.

data.title: Shiba Inu (SHIB) Refuses to Be Dethroned by Litecoin, With $350 Million Advantage
data.description:
Shiba Inu (SHIB) in danger as $13 billion battle with Litecoin heats up, Here's what it's about
source: https://u.today/shiba-inu-shib-refuses-to-be-dethroned-by-litecoin-with-350-million-advantage

data.title: Japanese clothing chain Mac House plans to purchase about $11.8 million in Bitcoin and other crypto assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Japanese clothing chain Mac House has completed fundraising by allocating new share reservation rights to third parties, raising a total of 2.391 billion yen (about 16.42 million US dollars), exceeding the original plan of 1.476 billion yen (about 10.13 million US dollars). Of this, up to 1.715 billion yen (about 11.8 million US dollars) will be used to purchase crypto assets such as Bitcoin, a significant increase from the previously planned 800 million yen. Previously, Mac House announced the launch of a new strategy of "financial, investment, and M&A business" on June 12, and revealed that it would invest in crypto assets. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Project Eleven Completes $6 Million in Financing, Led by Variant Fund and Quantonation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Project Eleven, a company focused on post-quantum cryptography development, has completed a $6 million financing led by Variant Fund and quantum technology investment institution Quantonation. The new funds will be used to develop tools to resist quantum computing attacks and protect the security of digital assets such as Bitcoin. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Hypersphere partner: Encountered Zoom phishing attack, 6 wallets had funds stolen
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Hypersphere Investment Partner Mehdi Farooq said that after a fake Zoom call phishing attack, his 6 wallet funds were stolen and years of savings were lost. (Cointelegraph)

XRP secured important milestone

data.title: OKX and Consensys to bring DEX aggregator to MetaMask
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX has reached a cooperation with Ethereum development company Consensys to connect its DEX aggregator to the MetaMask wallet. The integration will provide MetaMask users with liquidity support covering 25 blockchains and more than 500 decentralized exchanges, with transaction execution speeds of less than 100 milliseconds. As part of the cooperation, the OKX wallet also uses Consensys's SERVO solution, becoming the first third-party wallet to integrate the MEV (maximum extractable value) attack protection system. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: SOL Strategies: Filed Form 40-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, SOL Strategies announced that it has submitted Form 40-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, which is an important step in listing on Nasdaq under the stock code STKE. After the 40-F form becomes effective and the Nasdaq listing application is approved, SOL Strategies expects its common shares to begin trading on Nasdaq under the code STKE, while continuing to trade on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the code HODL.

data.title: Trump's company reduced its stake in the crypto project WLFI, but has not yet publicly promoted it
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to an analysis of the details of the official World Liberty website, a company owned by Donald Trump (suspected to be DT Marks DEFI LLC) has reduced its stake in the crypto project World Liberty Financial from 60% to 40% in the past 11 days. This change has not been publicly publicized, which is another sign that Trump himself or those acting on his behalf are still secretly conducting behind-the-scenes transactions during his tenure. (Forbes)

Social media platform X considers adding investment and trading features under CEO Linda Yaccarino.

data.title: Presto Research: Corporate crypto asset reserves are at risk of a bubble, but it’s “more subtle” than before
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Presto Research analysis, the current "crypto asset reserve strategy" of companies incorporating crypto assets into financial report reserves has obvious bubble risks, but its pattern is more complex and subtle than previous market cycles.
Presto Research pointed out that this trend has potential risks, such as market adjustments, liquidity crises and leverage issues. But compared with the ICO bubble in 2017-18, the current reserve strategy has more structural differences, such as convertible bond financing, attracting capital with the help of leading figures, and being driven by policies. In addition, analysts warned that if the volatility of the crypto market intensifies, these reserve companies may face rapid selling pressure and even trigger systemic risks. This round of strategy combines Bitcoin reserves with stock financing, leverage tools and policy motivations, making it fundamentally different from the purely speculative bubbles in the past. (The Block)

data.title: Decentralized exchange Aster completes the first phase of its incentive plan, stops points distribution and launches trading incentives
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, decentralized exchange Aster announced that its Spectra Phase I incentive plan will officially end at 23:59 UTC on June 22, and the Rh points distribution will stop. This phase attracted a total of 478,000 addresses to participate, with a total transaction volume of US$37.7 billion. New trading incentives will be introduced before the second phase begins.
Aster also stated that the second phase of the incentive plan will be announced at an appropriate time.
